title: I Updated /grill-me And Solved Claude Code
summary: Chase AI presents an update to /grill-me, introducing grill-me-codex as a verification layer for Claude Code outputs. The skill validates generated code to ensure outputs make sense, extending the planning and execution capabilities of the underlying Claude framework.
